exit.label: Close
exit.title: Leave the conversion?
exit.body: Your choices won't be saved. Your current program stays exactly as it is.

intro.subtitle: Your customers keep their card and their progress. We convert everything for you.

how.title: What happens during the switch
how.inPlace: Every balance is converted in one go, with a rule you choose in the next steps.
how.noRedownload: Cards update on their own. Nobody has to download a new card.
how.rerender: Each card shows your new card style the next time it refreshes.

intro.churnWarning: You already switched types on {date}. Switching again this soon can confuse your regulars. Take a moment before you continue.

pushing.title: A switch is already running
pushing.body: Your program is being converted right now. You can follow the progress, but you cannot start a new switch until it finishes.

program.subtitleToPoints: Decide how customers earn points and what they can redeem.
program.subtitleToStamp: Decide how many stamps fill a card and what the reward is.

design.subtitle: We pre-filled your colors and logo. The new card only goes live once the switch completes.

picker.title: {count, plural, =1 {You already have a saved card of this type} other {You already have # saved cards of this type}}
picker.subtitle: Edit one of them, duplicate it to keep the original, or create a new card.

design.stripPending: We are rendering your stamp images. This takes a few seconds.

customers.title: Convert your customers' balances
customers.subtitle: Pick the rate and the rule, then check the result. Nothing changes yet.
customers.rateHelpToPoints: Each stamp becomes {rate} point(s). We always round down to whole points.
customers.rateHelpToStamp: Every {rate} points become 1 stamp. We always round down to whole stamps.
customers.rateSuggested: Suggested rate: {rate}, based on your cheapest reward.
customers.policyLabelToPoints: What happens to rewards already earned?
customers.policyLabelToStamp: What happens to points beyond a full card?

cheapest_reward_equivalent.name: Grant their value in points
cheapest_reward_equivalent.desc: Each pending reward becomes the points price of your cheapest reward. Simple and fair.

full_card_equivalent.name: Grant a full card's worth
full_card_equivalent.desc: Each pending reward becomes the points value of a complete stamp card.

discard.name: Let them expire
discard.desc: Pending rewards are lost for your customers. Only use this if nobody holds one.

bank_full_cards.name: Keep every full card
bank_full_cards.desc: Each full card's worth of points becomes a pending reward. Nobody loses anything.

bank_one.name: Keep a single reward
bank_one.desc: One full card becomes a pending reward. Points beyond that are lost.

cap_card.name: Cap at one card
cap_card.desc: Balances convert up to one full card. Points beyond that are lost.

impact.title: Impact on your customers
impact.cappedWarning: {count, plural, =1 {1 customer exceeds your cap of {max} points: their balance will be cut to {max} points and the excess is lost.} other {# customers exceed your cap of {max} points: their balances will be cut to {max} points and the excess is lost.}} You can raise or remove the cap in the program step.

sample.title: Before and after, on real customers

customers.previewError: We could not compute the preview. Check the rate and try again.

notifications.title: Update your notifications
notifications.subtitle: These apply the moment the switch completes. Leave anything empty and our standard messages take over.

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.help: A one-off message when a customer reaches a threshold.

notifications.disabledNotice: {count, plural, =1 {Your existing milestone will be turned off} other {Your # existing milestones will be turned off}}: its thresholds refer to the old system. Rebuild them here, or later from the notifications page.
notifications.staleVars: These variables do not exist in the new program and would show as raw text: {vars}

broadcasts.title: Scheduled broadcasts on hold
broadcasts.subtitle: These broadcasts target customers using values from your current program, and those values change with the switch.
broadcasts.explain: When you convert, they move back to drafts. Check their audience and reschedule them from the broadcasts page.

review.title: Review before you convert
review.subtitle: One last look. Nothing changes until you confirm.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.custom: Your custom messages replace the standard ones.
notifications.milestonesStaged: {count, plural, =1 {1 new milestone} other {# new milestones}}
notifications.milestonesDisabled: {count, plural, =1 {1 old milestone turned off} other {# old milestones turned off}}

broadcasts.title: Broadcasts
broadcasts.paused: {count, plural, =1 {1 scheduled broadcast moves back to drafts} other {# scheduled broadcasts move back to drafts}}

announce.label: Announce the change on your customers' cards
announce.help: A short message shows on their phone when their card updates.

confirm.title: Convert your program?
confirm.body: The conversion starts immediately and cannot be undone. Every balance is converted and your customers' cards update on their own.

execute.convertingBody: Every customer's balance is being converted. This only takes a moment.
execute.pushingBody: Cards refresh on your customers' phones. They have nothing to do.

success.titleToPoints: Your program now runs on points
success.titleToStamp: Your program now runs on stamps
success.converted: {count, plural, =1 {1 customer converted} other {# customers converted}}
success.broadcasts: {count, plural, =1 {1 broadcast moved back to drafts} other {# broadcasts moved back to drafts}}. Check their audience and reschedule them.
success.milestones: {count, plural, =1 {1 old milestone turned off} other {# old milestones turned off}}.

failed.title: The switch did not complete
failed.body: Nothing was lost: your program is still on its previous type. Try again, and contact us if it happens twice.

announceDefaults.toPoints: Our loyalty program is evolving: your stamps are now points. Your balance was converted automatically, nothing to do on your side.
announceDefaults.toStamp: Our loyalty program is evolving: your points are now stamps. Your balance was converted automatically, nothing to do on your side.

entry.title: Program type
entry.body: You can switch types without losing anyone: every balance is converted and cards update on their own.

errors.notAllowed: Your current plan does not include the points program.
errors.designNotReady: Your card is still rendering. Give it a few seconds and try again.
